calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Joel K. Belway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert P. Praetzel, Edward Alterman and Elaine A. Levy, co-trustees of the Gertrude and Samuel Alterman Trusts.
Plaintiff's witness: Charles Gaetani, present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendant: Amsterdam Art, Inc., aka Amsterdam Art, aka Amsterdam Art, Incorporated, aka Wholesale Art Materials, aka Black Market Art Materials, aka Tools of the Trade Show as follows:
Principal balance $29,863.94
Interest $3,542.76
Attorney's fees of $2,077.50
Costs of $274.50
For the total of $35,758.70
Judgment signed in open court.
